mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blocks(block_idx, bno, start_time, end_time, checked_ai, color_idx) VALUES(seq_block.nextval, #{bno}, TO_DATE(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '0', 1)
SELECT seq_block.CURRVAL FROM dual
mapper.update: UPDATE blocks SET place_id = #{placeId} WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM (SELECT * FROM blocks bl INNER JOIN boards bo ON bl.bno = bo.bno WHERE bo.bno = #{bno} AND writer_id = #{memberId})
mapper.update: UPDATE blocks SET color_idx = #{colorIdx} WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}
UPDATE blocks SET start_time = TO_DATE(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), end_time = TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}
UPDATE blocks SET checked_ai = #{checkedAi} WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}
UPDATE blocks SET travel_time = #{travelTime} WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(b.start_time,'HH24:MI') "startTime", TO_CHAR(b.end_time,'HH24:MI') "endTime", b.checked_ai "checkedAi", b.color_idx "colorIdx", c.color_code "colorCode", p.name "name", p.category "category", p.address "address", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng" FROM blocks b LEFT OUTER JOIN places p ON b.place_id = p.place_id INNER JOIN colors c ON b.color_idx = c.color_idx WHERE block_idx = #{blockIdx}

SELECT b.block_idx "blockIdx", TO_CHAR(b.start_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') "startTime", TO_CHAR(b.end_time,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') "endTime", b.checked_ai "checkedAi", b.travel_time "travelTime", b.color_idx "colorIdx", c.color_code "colorCode", p.name "name", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng" FROM blocks b LEFT OUTER JOIN places p ON b.place_id = p.place_id INNER JOIN colors c ON b.color_idx = c.color_idx WHERE b.bno = #{bno} ORDER BY start_time

SELECT b.block_idx "blockIdx", b.start_time "startTime", b.end_time "endTime", b.checked_ai "checkedAi", b.travel_time "travelTime", b.color_idx "colorIdx", c.color_code "colorCode", p.name "name", p.lat "lat", p.lng "lng" FROM blocks b LEFT OUTER JOIN places p ON b.place_id = p.place_id INNER JOIN colors c ON b.color_idx = c.color_idx WHERE b.bno = #{bno} AND start_time BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{inputStartTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{inputEndTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY start_time
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM blocks WHERE bno = #{bno} AND trunc(start_time) = TO_DATE(#{date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
mapper.select: SELECT color_idx "colorIdx", color_code "colorCode" FROM colors ORDER BY color_idx
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blocks(block_idx, bno, place_id, start_time, end_time, checked_ai, color_idx) SELECT SEQ_BLOCK.NEXTVAL, #{newBno}, place_id, start_time + (TO_DATE(#{newStartTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TRUNC(start_time)), end_time + (TO_DATE(#{newStartTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TRUNC(end_time)), 0, color_idx FROM blocks WHERE bno = #{bno}
